headline: Growing the OOH Sector, Chief Development Officer @ AdQuick
summary: I'm focused on helping the OOH sector and AdQuick grow through innovative commercial partnerships with media operators, media agencies, advertisers, and measurement providers.

experiences.title: Vice President, Demand & Analytics Partnerships
experiences.description: I lead partnerships with omnichannel demand side platforms, measurement platforms, planning platforms, data providers, media operators, and agencies focused on generating sales by creating innovative KPI-focused OOH analytics solutions and value-driven pricing models.

experiences.title: Team Lead, Global Performance Media Investment & AdTech Product Management
experiences.description:
My team and I were responsible for creating and managing AdTech products, AdTech product operations, and ad buying processes that helped Meta as a portfolio of brands maximize its own efficacy in driving brand & product marketing outcomes from its advertising investments. 

I led enterprise-level performance advertising partnerships with demand side platforms, measurement companies, and data companies to provide all brand & product marketing teams from Meta, Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Reality Labs, etc and our media agencies with access to technologies, strategy & planning resources, and operational resourcing.  

Once partnerships were established, we then lead AdTech product strategy, AdTech operations, and media buying processes in areas such as integrating 1st and 3rd party data in targeting, measurement, and optimization as well as building buying operational frameworks for planning, measuring, optimizing, and reporting on campaigns.

Last, my team are responsible for partnering with privacy, legal, and policy in building enterprise marketing privacy frameworks and managing all marketing privacy reviews to ensure compliance with privacy regulations, industry policies and internal policies.

experiences.title: Global Performance Manager, Media Investment Centers of Excellence
Consumer Marketing, Digital Media Manager
experiences.description: As a part of the Facebook Watch product marketing organization, I was responsible for driving viewing of FB Watch content and awareness of the FB Watch streaming product by leading cross-channel brand and content advertising campaigns.  During the short amount of time that I was on the FB Watch team, I drove significant lifts in content viewing (i.e. Sorry for Your Loss) and FB Watch product awareness.  Due to my demonstrated skills in advertising, I was tapped to create central/horizontal strategic frameworks and solutions for helping all product marketing teams across Meta's enterprise maximize performance from advertising investments.

experiences.title: Manager, Programmatic Marketing - Global
experiences.description: Significantly lifted global subscriber acquisitions and member content viewing through end-to-end design, execution, and optimization of digital advertising campaigns

experiences.title: Manager, Programmatic Marketing - EMEA
experiences.description: Supported Netflix's launches into new markets across EMEA by generating stat-sig subscriber acquisitions via digital advertising campaigns

experiences.title: Programmatic Media Planning & Buying, Senior Manager
experiences.description:
- Guided the Ad Operations Team in media planning and setting up, optimizing, and reporting on RTB display and video campaigns for advertisers of all sizes across the United States. 
- Generated sales from new and existing clients through technical sales calls and account support 
- Partnered with the Engineering Team to automate campaign setup
- Produced RTB media plans and campaign reports for advertisers of all sizes across the United States
- Partnered with the Sales team in acquiring new customers and channel partners
- Collaborated with the Engineering team to automate media planning workflows

experiences.title: Marketing Director and Neurofeedback Technician
experiences.description:
- Designed and executed online marketing plans geared at establishing Peter Newsom MD's online brand, raising brand awareness and creating demand via website development, social media, and online directories.
- Started a nonprofit on behalf of Peter Newsom MD geared toward providing families after-school and summer recreational and educational programs.
- Managed community relationships for the nonprofit with schools, public facilities, and parks to generate interest in the company's services and obtain free space for events and programs.
- Promoted and coordinated fundraising and educational events for the nonprofit.

experiences.title: Marketing Associate
experiences.description: Collaborated with the company's owner in creating and executing marketing plans, conducting business development with local schools, and recruiting, hiring, and supervising tutors and marketing specialists.

experiences.title: Behavioral Specialist
experiences.description: Implemented behavioral therapy programs with kids, students, and adults with special needs. Awarded Specialist of the Year, 2009.

education.school: Santa Clara University Leavey School of Business

accomplishment_projects.title: 2014 SABR Analytics Case Competition
accomplishment_projects.description: This is our submitted presentation for the 2014 SABR Baseball Analytics Case Competition. The deliverable was to use a creative and logical thought process to value the top three pitching assets in baseball today. Using an Analytical Hierarchy Process (AHP) model to integrate statistical analysis with the human element of scouting, we narrowed down our scope to five players. We then modeled a public perception variable scraping data from Twitter and Local Media websites followed by a Monte Carlo risk analysis. Finally, we built a forecasting model to project WAR over remaining control years and discounted back to come up with an NPV for our top three pitching assets.

accomplishment_projects.title: MGMT 503: EA Sports Organizational Diagnosis
accomplishment_projects.description: An organizational diagnosis of EA Sports, a division of Electronic Arts.

accomplishment_projects.title: EA Sports Organizational Analysis
accomplishment_projects.description: This is an organizational analysis of EA Sports which encompasses several organizational design change recommendations that EA Sports could implement to improve its performance in terms of efficiency and effectiveness. The link will take you to a Google Drive folder with both a presentation and a paper of the analysis. If interested in taking a look, I would encourage downloading the file from Google Drive in order to see all of the presentation's animations and the layers of each slide.

volunteer_work.title: Commissioner, Advisory Board for Consumer Affairs
volunteer_work.description: •  Worked with fellow Commissioners in gathering and analyzing research and reports on various issues impacting Santa Clara County consumers. •  Formulated and analyzed actionable legislative proposals for the Board of Supervisors.

volunteer_work.title: Founder and CEO
volunteer_work.description: Led the nonprofit's rock climbing programs, advocacy services, and fundraising events for the special needs community; recruited and guided volunteers and employees; represented the company at trade shows and community events.
